title: Gender Sex of Non Lilim Persons
display_title: Gender Sex of Non Lilim Persons
wikitext:
[]: Gender/Sex of Non-Lilim Persons             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Nov 09, 2006 10:05 pm Sorta messy split from Kaworu XX . A split from a split -- how cute. ~Reichu Well the soul theory is a lot more probable then Kaworu being physically female since kowarus soul came from adam. But then again assigning concrete genders to most of the angels is something I always found to be a bit dodgy since we know very little of how their biology actually works. Yes Lillith and Adam gave birth to the other angels and eva unit 01, but how did they get impregnated in the first place we don't know! I mean Israfel can split itself into two seperate beings. Anyway later I'll get those screencaps and some other things up here that I don't have time to post now.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Nov 09, 2006 10:10 pm I can't see a SOL being anything but female. After all they're human, and what gender gives birth in humans?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Nov 09, 2006 10:32 pm If a SOL, a being who spawns new beings, but doesn't RE-produce (as in producing a similar being in essence) without any kind of intercourse with another SOL of opposite gender... if that's a female.... then we should call amoebas female too. Or all those beings who reproduce by partitioning too. All female. The male-female classifiaction only works with beings who: 1) Reproduce, not spawn 2) Require intercourse with a being from the same species but different in accident or complementary. The SoL's don't reproduce, the SoL's don't have intercourse. The female/male classifications, as I see it, doesn't apply here.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 09, 2006 10:35 pm AchtungAffen wrote: Yare yare da ze (Joutarou style)

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Nov 09, 2006 10:41 pm Reichu wrote: AchtungAffen wrote: Yare yare da ze (Joutarou style)

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Nov 09, 2006 10:48 pm Reichu wrote: cat42 wrote: Kaworu is a guy, he has a penis

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 09, 2006 10:52 pm AchtungAffen wrote: ジョジョの奇妙な冒険はしらないのか？

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Nov 09, 2006 11:01 pm AchtungAffen wrote: If a SOL, a being who spawns new beings, but doesn't RE-produce (as in producing a similar being in essence) without any kind of intercourse with another SOL of opposite gender... if that's a female.... then we should call amoebas female too. Or all those beings who reproduce by partitioning too. All female. The male-female classifiaction only works with beings who: 1) Reproduce, not spawn 2) Require intercourse with a being from the same species but different in accident or complementary. The SoL's don't reproduce, the SoL's don't have intercourse. The female/male classifications, as I see it, doesn't apply here.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Nov 09, 2006 11:01 pm Reichu wrote: AchtungAffen wrote: ジョジョの奇妙な冒険はしらないのか？

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Nov 09, 2006 11:04 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Have you ever heard of artificial insemination? Seriously why go through the trouble of genetically engineering an asexual human when you can just modify an existing female?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 09, 2006 11:29 pm AchtungAffen wrote: I have heard about artificial insemination, but not in Eva (as in the case we're discussing). Why modify a human and seed it, when you can have an Ã¼ber being who just shits individual life forms (as they call em in EoE).

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 10, 2006 12:00 am 皆はなぜ話すこと日本語であるか?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 10, 2006 12:12 am Ornette wrote: 皆はなぜ話すこと日本語であるか?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Nov 10, 2006 12:23 am Reichu wrote: How would, say, Adam go about "shitting" individual lifeforms? Where do the various genes for new individuals come from? Lilith at least doesn't have to birth individual lifeforms (with one exception); she can just bleed an organic cocktail out of her vazhin and let nature do the rest.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 10, 2006 12:54 am AchtungAffen wrote: About Ritsuko, I don't know which part you're talking about.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Nov 10, 2006 1:12 am AchtungAffen wrote: I don't know where them genes come from. Don't know if they need new genes or not, or even if angel genes have much of a concrete existance as supposedly Eva's pseudo-humans have. I don't even know if they need gene exchange or whatever goes in humans. All those technical stuff is never explained in Eva and is left in the dark. One of those unmeasurables, like for example, gravity in Eva or the equations for the Dirac Sea intra-Eva. We don't even get to see how life on earth originated from Lilith. It might be that Lilith bled, but it also might be the product of a snort or some sort of angelic diahrrea. They're part of those things that can be as well as they can't be, suppositions of things never shown, but suppositions without the empiria behind them.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Nov 10, 2006 1:21 am Going to have to wait a bit longer for the pictures, imageshack says their too big, photoshop is on my other harddrive, so to size them down I'd need to switch over and I'm almost going to bed right now and my laziness is starting to take over, but they will be up tommarow, until then, time to address a few other things. I meant the whiptailed lizards. In some vertebrate species, sexual reproduction has actually been abandoned and the females give birth to clones of themselves -- parthenogenesis. (The whiptails are "lesbians" because they need to act out coitus with another female before they can ovulate, or something.) Still called "females", though.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 10, 2006 1:43 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Adam got pregnant when someone dived genes into her the result being Tabris. MAN F: Suppress the surface radiation! It's over the projected limit! FEMALE ANNOUNCER: Emergency situation! Emergency situation! WOMAN B: The DNA that was inserted into Adam is already physically fused !

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 10, 2006 2:52 am Reichu wrote: Ornette wrote: 皆はなぜ話すこと日本語であるか?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Nov 10, 2006 3:35 am Defectron wrote: Anyway, this seems like it may be a good explanation to how unit 01 was born, but something different appears to have been the case with the angels. Below are a few theories of mine, these are just ideas I've toyed with and theres not really any evidence for them and shouldnt be treated as such.
